notes: RE-ASSESSED post-#719+#766+golden-summary surfacing, RE-ANCHORED to the live 2-turn recording. TWO trivial turns are required: decoding the failed single-turn 1.8 recording's captured store showed gen_metadata held only an idx=0 row with contextTokens=0 — agy records ZERO in-context tokens after the FIRST turn, so context only accrues from turn 2 (this 2-turn recording's golden shows total_tokens=16268, context_window=1048576, context_utilization_percentage=1.55). SESSION MODEL (corrected by the live recording — now the TWO-PHASE presession model, NOT single-birth): antigravity's birth is non-deterministic; in THIS recording PID discovery won the launch race so events.jsonl shows a transient proc-<PID> presession (proc-23353: presession_created -> state_transition ready -> pid_discovered), then a DISTINCT conv-id session 873edfa9 (transcript_new -> state_transition ready -> working/ready twice); pid_discovered later fires on the conv-id and the proc-row is transcript_removed. Every post-birth phase anchors to the REAL conv-id session, never the proc-row. pid_discovered fires on the conv-id (pid_bind asserted), but there is NO process_exited, so NO teardown phase. On each turn_done applyDBMetrics (parser.go:180) reads conversations/<conv>.db and sets ModelName (canonical resolvable id, NOT 'unknown') + Tokens.Total = context-occupancy tokens (gen_metadata field #5); #766's StageReplayStore captures+serves the store and finalizeSummary (metrics.go:52-59) lifts the store vector into the golden summary, so context_window_nonzero + context_utilization_nonzero are verify-checkable after the 2nd turn. tokens_nonzero is deliberately NOT asserted — it reads cum_input+cum_output (observations.go:37) which antigravity never feeds. COST is NOT asserted — antigravity persists no cost (deferred #716). Model left PROVISIONAL — the golden's model_name is the db canonical id (gemini-pro-default), not pinned.

text: Transient proc-<PID> presession born ready on launch (presession_created -> state_transition ready)
Conv-id session reconciles (different session_id), born ready when agy writes transcript.jsonl
PID binds to the conv-id session (pid_discovered on the real session; the proc-row presession is then cleaned up)
Turn 1: the trivial prompt drives the conv-id session ready -> working on the first transcript activity
Turn 1 completes back to ready; applyDBMetrics reads the store but contextTokens is still 0 after the first turn, so context metrics are NOT yet asserted here
Turn 2: the follow-up prompt drives the SAME conv-id session ready -> working

Turn 2 completes back to ready; by this turn_done agy's store has recorded non-zero contextTokens, so the served store + capacity table give context_window > 0 and context_utilization_percentage > 0 (the context_window_nonzero + context_utilization_nonzero observations). ModelName is the resolved boot model, not 'unknown'.
